message:
style(mysql): Apply rustfmt formatting to MySQL crate

Applies consistent formatting across MySQL driver crate files:

- async_connection.rs: Line wrapping and spacing adjustments
- config.rs: Multi-line function signatures and assert formatting
- protocol/prepared.rs: Pattern match alignment
- types.rs: Multi-line match arm formatting
- create.rs: Consistent indentation throughout

No functional changes - pure formatting to match project style.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
